title: yosys fails in synthesizing flip-flop with asynchronous reset and ternary operator ?:

features.name: always_ff with async reset and ternary in RHS
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with a sensitivity list containing both posedge clk and posedge async_reset, where the RHS of the assignment uses a ternary operator with the async reset signal as the condition
features.snippet:
always_ff @ (posedge ck, posedge r)
  q <= r ? '0 : d;
